_label_note: JP Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow precision fixes covered JP public-helpline phone bait, definitional undisclosed-material-fact prose, negated material-adverse-change wording, and educational insider-list prose. Direct-identifiers coverage was manually tuned to include checksum-valid My Number, Corporate Number, and JP postal-code positives.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.
